declarations.description:
The core layout component for the application.
Handles theme switching, FAB configurations, and navigation slotting.
Uses Material Design 3 tokens and components.
declarations.name: AppShell

slots.description: The place for the dynamic application content
slots.name: app-content

members.description: Generates the label string for a FAB based on its configuration style.

members.description: Tracks closed dialogs to manage body scroll restoration.

members.description: Tracks open dialogs to manage body scroll locking.

members.description:

declarations.description:
A comprehensive configuration dialog for managing application settings.
Allows users to toggle dark mode, change color themes, adjust contrast,
and customize Floating Action Button (FAB) behaviors.
declarations.name: ConfigsDialog

members.name: hideDialog
members.description: Hides the configuration dialog.

members.name: showDialog

parameters.name: formContent
parameters.description: The initial section to display in the dialog. Defaults to "ui-mode".

members.description: Shows the configuration dialog.

events.name: color_scheme.change
events.description: Dispatched when the UI theme, mode, or contrast is changed.

events.name: fab.change
events.description: Dispatched when a FAB's position or style is modified.

declarations.description:
A dialog component that provides various contact methods and social links.
It features collapsible sections for different connection categories.
declarations.name: ConnectDialog

cssProperties.description: The animation duration for expanding/collapsing connection details.
cssProperties.name: --connect-dialog-content-transition

members.name: hideDialog
members.description: Maps to MdDialog's close method

members.name: showDialog
members.description: Shows the connect dialog and applies a custom border to the internal container.

declarations.description:
A versatile confirmation dialog used to verify user intent before performing
significant actions like resetting settings.
declarations.name: StepUpDialog

slots.description: The area of dialog action buttons
slots.name: actions

members.name: dialogContentString
members.description: The text content to display in the dialog body.

members.name: dialogStyle
members.description: The visual style variant of the dialog, affecting colors and icons.

members.name: icons
members.default: { confirm: html`<md-icon slot="icon">check_circle</md-icon>`, warning: html`<md-icon slot="icon">warning</md-icon>`, attention: html`<md-icon slot="icon">report</md-icon>`, }

members.name: primaryActions
members.default: { confirm: html` <md-filled-button @click=${(event: PointerEvent) => this.onButtonClick(false, event)}>Confirm</md-filled-button> `, warning: html` <md-filled-button @click=${(event: PointerEvent) => this.onButtonClick(false, event)}>Continue</md-filled-button> `, attention: html` <md-filled-button @click=${(event: PointerEvent) => this.onButtonClick(false, event)}>Accept</md-filled-button> `, }

members.name: showDialog
members.description: Shows the step-up confirmation dialog.

events.name: stepUpComplete
events.description: Dispatched when the user confirms or cancels the action.

members.name: ariaLabel
members.description: The `aria-label` of the FAB.

members.name: direction
members.description: The direction in which the menu items should expand.

members.name: icon
members.description:
The MaterialSymbol to display when the menu
is closed. Defaults to 'add'. An empty string
  suppresses the icon

members.name: label
members.description:
The label of the underlying MdFab.
Defaults to an empty string.

members.name: open
members.description: Whether the menu is currently open.

members.name: openedIcon
members.description:
The icon to display when the menu is open.
Defaults to 'close'.

members.name: size
members.description:
The size of the FAB.
Can be 'small', 'medium', or 'large'.
Defaults to 'medium'.

members.name: variant
members.description:
The variant of the FAB.
Can be 'surface', 'primary', 'secondary', or 'tertiary'.
Defaults to 'primary'.

The color variant theme for the header background and text.
Can be 'primary', 'secondary', or 'tertiary'.

attributes.description:
The color variant theme for the header background and text.

declarations.description:
A reusable section component for profile-related content.
Uses container queries to provide a responsive grid layout that adapts to available space.

API
--
declarations.name: ProfileSection

members.name: sectionTitle
members.description:
The text shown in the section heading (`

`). Corresponds to the attribute `section-title`. Slot API -- : (required) Container for section body content. Preserves the responsive grid layout. Example: ```html
...your list, cards, or details...
```

attributes.name: section-title
attributes.description:
The text shown in the section heading (`

`). Corresponds to the attribute `section-title`. Slot API -- : (required) Container for section body content. Preserves the responsive grid layout. Example: ```html
...your list, cards, or details...
```

declarations.description: A component that renders a cloud of words with various sorting and grouping options.
declarations.name: WordCloud

cssProperties.description: Duration of the entrance animation for each word.
cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-animation

cssProperties.description: Duration of the entrance animation when prefers-reduced-motion is active.
cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-animation-reduced

cssProperties.description: Font size for words in the first weight quartile (highest weight).
cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-first-quartile-font-size

cssProperties.description: Line height for words in the first weight quartile.
cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-first-quartile-line-height

cssProperties.description: Font size for words in the second weight quartile.
cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-second-quartile-font-size

cssProperties.description: Line height for words in the second weight quartile.
cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-second-quartile-line-height

cssProperties.description: Font size for words in the third weight quartile.
cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-third-quartile-font-size

cssProperties.description: Line height for words in the third weight quartile.
cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-third-quartile-line-height

cssProperties.description: Font size for words in the fourth weight quartile (lowest weight).
cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-fourth-quartile-font-size

cssProperties.description: Line height for words in the fourth weight quartile.
cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-fourth-quartile-line-height

members.name: appearance
members.description:
Controls the order in which words are animated/displayed.

Can be 'sequential' (words appear one by one) or 'simultaneous' (words appear all at once).

members.name: delay
members.description:
The delay in milliseconds between word appearances when using sequential mode.

Set to "none" to use the component's internal default delays.

members.name: grouping
members.description:
Controls how words are grouped together within the cloud.

Supported modes: 'category', 'quartile', or 'ungrouped'.

members.name: instantClear
members.description:
Whether to clear the word cloud instantly when it is no longer visible.
When true, the cloud resets instantly to opacity 0 instead of fading out.

members.name: sorting
members.description:
Controls how words are sorted within their groupings.

Supported modes: 'by-weight', 'by-weight-reversed', 'by-alphabet', 'by-alphabet-reversed', or 'none'.

members.name: threshold
members.description:
The intersection observer threshold for visibility detection.

A value between 0 and 1 indicating what percentage of the element must be visible to trigger animation.

members.name: words
members.description: The list of words to display in the cloud.

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.description:
Controls the order in which words are animated/displayed.

Can be 'sequential' (words appear one by one) or 'simultaneous' (words appear all at once).

attributes.name: delay
attributes.description:
The delay in milliseconds between word appearances when using sequential mode.

Set to "none" to use the component's internal default delays.

attributes.name: grouping
attributes.description:
Controls how words are grouped together within the cloud.

Supported modes: 'category', 'quartile', or 'ungrouped'.

attributes.name: instant-clear
attributes.description:
Whether to clear the word cloud instantly when it is no longer visible.
When true, the cloud resets instantly to opacity 0 instead of fading out.

attributes.name: sorting
attributes.description:
Controls how words are sorted within their groupings.

Supported modes: 'by-weight', 'by-weight-reversed', 'by-alphabet', 'by-alphabet-reversed', or 'none'.

attributes.name: threshold
attributes.description:
The intersection observer threshold for visibility detection.

A value between 0 and 1 indicating what percentage of the element must be visible to trigger animation.

attributes.name: words
attributes.description: The list of words to display in the cloud.

declarations.description:
A component for displaying professional work experience entries.
Supports nesting for sub-roles or specific project assignments under a single employer.
declarations.name: WorkExperience

members.name: dateEnd
members.description: End date information including machine-readable stamp and display text.
stamp: "", text: "" } - A {@link WorkDate} instance describing employment end date
members.name: dateEnd={
dateStart
members.description: Start date information including machine-readable stamp and display text.
stamp: "", text: "" } - A {@link WorkDate} instance describing employment start date
members.name: dateStart={
experienceOrg
members.description: The name of the organization or client.
The employer formal name
members.name: experienceOrg=""
experienceRole
members.description: The title of the professional role or project.
The formal role from the {@link WorkExperience} instance
members.name: experienceRole=""

members.description: An optional summary of the overall role
members.name: experienceSummary=""
isNested
members.description: If true, adjusts font sizes and layout for a nested appearance.
Whether this is a nested instance
members.name: isNested=false
jobs
members.description: A list of sub-jobs or project assignments to be rendered as nested experiences.
An array of {@link Job}s rendered as nested {@link WorkExperience} instances
members.name: jobs=[]
summaries
members.description: A list of summary points describing achievements or responsibilities.
An array of `{ item: string }` objects describing the responsibilities
members.name: summaries=[]

attributes.name: date-end
attributes.description: End date information including machine-readable stamp and display text.

attributes.name: date-start
attributes.description: Start date information including machine-readable stamp and display text.

attributes.name: experience-org
attributes.description: The name of the organization or client.

attributes.name: experience-role
attributes.description: The title of the professional role or project.

attributes.name: is-nested
attributes.description: If true, adjusts font sizes and layout for a nested appearance.

attributes.name: jobs
attributes.description: A list of sub-jobs or project assignments to be rendered as nested experiences.

attributes.name: summaries
attributes.description: A list of summary points describing achievements or responsibilities.

declarations.name: Routes
declarations.default: { PROFILE: "profile" as const, WORK: "work" as const, CODE: "code" as const, BLOG: "blog" as const, // SETTINGS: "settings" as const, // CONNECT: "connect" as const, }

declarations.name: makeWordCloudWord
declarations.description: A factory function to create a WordCloudWord

declarations.name: WordCloudAppearances
declarations.default: { SIMULTANEOUS: "simultaneous" as const, SEQUENTIAL: "sequential" as const, }

declarations.name: WordCloudGroupings
declarations.default: { CATEGORY: "category" as const, QUARTILE: "quartile" as const, UNGROUPED: "ungrouped" as const, }

declarations.name: WordCloudSortings

type.text:
{
  BY_WEIGHT: "by-weight" as const,
  BY_WEIGHT_REVERSED: "by-weight-reversed" as const,
  BY_ALPHABET: "by-alphabet" as const,
  BY_ALPHABET_REVERSED: "by-alphabet-reversed" as const,
  NONE: "none" as const,
}

declarations.default: { BY_WEIGHT: "by-weight" as const, BY_WEIGHT_REVERSED: "by-weight-reversed" as const, BY_ALPHABET: "by-alphabet" as const, BY_ALPHABET_REVERSED: "by-alphabet-reversed" as const, NONE: "none" as const, }

declarations.name: DEFAULT_APP_CONFIGS
declarations.default: { colorScheme: { theme: THEME_NAMES.inter, name: CONFIG_COLOR_SCHEME_NAMES.SYSTEM, contrast: CONFIG_COLOR_CONTRAST_NAMES.NORMAL, persist: false, } as const, fab: { settings: { position: FAB_POSITION.START_BOTTOM, style: FAB_STYLE.ICON_AND_TEXT, } as const, connect: { position: FAB_POSITION.END_BOTTOM, style: FAB_STYLE.ICON_AND_TEXT, } as const, } as const, }

declarations.name: FAB_POSITION
declarations.default: { START_TOP: "START_TOP" as const, START_BOTTOM: "START_BOTTOM" as const, END_TOP: "END_TOP" as const, END_BOTTOM: "END_BOTTOM" as const, }

declarations.name: FAB_POSITION_COMPONENTS_HORIZONTAL
declarations.default: { START: "START" as const, END: "END" as const, }

declarations.name: FAB_POSITION_COMPONENTS_VERTICAL
declarations.default: { TOP: "TOP" as const, BOTTOM: "BOTTOM" as const, }

declarations.name: FAB_STYLE
declarations.default: { ICON_ONLY: "ICON_ONLY" as const, ICON_AND_TEXT: "ICON_AND_TEXT" as const, ICON_ONLY_SMALL: "ICON_ONLY_SMALL" as const, TEXT_ONLY: "TEXT_ONLY" as const, }

declarations.name: FabPositionIcons
declarations.default: { START_TOP: html`<md-icon slot="start">subheader</md-icon>`, // The missing `position_top_left` to match the others END_TOP: html`<md-icon slot="start">position_top_right</md-icon>`, END_BOTTOM: html`<md-icon slot="start">position_bottom_right</md-icon>`, START_BOTTOM: html`<md-icon slot="start">position_bottom_left</md-icon>`, }

declarations.name: CONFIG_COLOR_CONTRAST_NAMES
declarations.default: { NORMAL: "NORMAL" as const, MEDIUM: "MEDIUM" as const, HIGH: "HIGH" as const, }

declarations.name: CONFIG_COLOR_SCHEME_NAMES
declarations.default: { DARK: "DARK" as const, LIGHT: "LIGHT" as const, SYSTEM: "SYSTEM" as const, }

declarations.name: THEME_NAMES
declarations.default: { chicago: "chicago" as const, inter: "inter" as const, red: "red" as const, // skyline: "skyline" as const, sunset: "sunset" as const, }
